title: Omega Bio-Tek Mag-Bind Plant DNA DS Kit
author: Opentrons
materials: Omega Bio-Tek Mag-Bind Plant DNA DS Kit

This protocol automates the [Omega Bio-Tek Mag-Bind® Plant DNA DS 96 Kit](https://www.omegabiotek.com/product/plant-extraction-mag-bind-plant-dna-ds-96/) on the OT-2. Using the [P300 8-Channel Pipette, GEN2](https://shop.opentrons.com/8-channel-electronic-pipette/) all liquid handling steps outlined in [the protocol](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-upload-01/u-4256/0/2021-12-14/kf03tt7/Omega%20BioTek%20Mag-Bind%20Plant%20DNA%20extraction%20automation%20protocol.pdf) are handled on the OT-2, with minimal user intervention. To optimize liquid handling on the automated platform, some reagents should be combined prior to adding to the deck (more details below). Explanation of complex parameters below: * **Pipette Mount**: Select which mount (left or right) the [P300 8-Channel Pipette, GEN2](https://shop.opentrons.com/8-channel-electronic-pipette/) is attached to. * **Number of Samples**: Specify the number of samples (1-96). Please note ~ because the 8-channel pipette is used in this protocol, any number will be rounded up to 8. * **Binding Time (minutes)**: Specify the number of minutes for binding, prior to the first supernatant removal. Please note that this is an estimate, as there will be continuous mixing throughout this step. * **MagDeck Incubation (minutes)**: Specify the number of minutes to delay the robot, while the MagDeck is engaged. * **Air Dry Time (minutes)**: Specify the number of minutes for air drying after the final wash step. * **Add Water Before Air Dry**: Specify whether or not to add, then remove 100µL of water immediately before the air dry step. * **Labware for Samples Input**: Select the labware that will contain the samples from the drop down. * **[QIAGEN ONLY] Aspiration Height**: Specify the height (in mm) from the bead to aspirate from (3mm is the default) * **Final Wash Removal (in µL)**: Specify the volume for the supernatant removal step during the final wash. * **Elution Volume (in µL)**: The volume of Elution Buffer added to each well. Pl

After initial incubation is complete, user can manually transfer 500µL of starting material to deepwell plate and place on Mag Deck or (if using Qiagen tubes) place empty deepwell plate on Mag Deck and samples onto OT-2 deck for automated transfer.

steps.title: [Off-robot manual step] The protocol begins...
steps.instruction: [Off-robot manual step] The protocol begins with the manual addition of 720µL of CSPL Buffer + Proteinase K (700+20) to each sample.

steps.title: If automating the initial sample transfer,...
steps.instruction: If automating the initial sample transfer, 500µL will be transferred to the 96-Well deepwell plate. Otherwise, OT-2 steps will begin with step 4.

steps.title: 525µL of RNase A + RBB...
steps.instruction: 525µL of RNase A + RBB Buffer + Mag-Bind Beads (5+500+20) is transferred to each column containing samples.

steps.title: A 10 minute incubation period will begin
steps.instruction: A 10 minute incubation period will begin. During this period, the OT-2 will mix each column for ~30 seconds before moving to the next column. In the case of 1 column of samples, the OT-2 will mix for ~30 seconds, then stop for 30 seconds before resuming the mix again.

steps.title: After incubating, the Mag Deck engages,...
steps.instruction: After incubating, the Mag Deck engages, and after the pellet forms, 1080µL is transferred to the NEST 1-Well Reservoir for liquid waste.

steps.title: 500µL of CSPW1 Buffer is added...
steps.instruction: 500µL of CSPW1 Buffer is added to each column of samples and mixed.

steps.title: After incubating on the Mag Deck,...
steps.instruction: After incubating on the Mag Deck, 600µL is transferred to the liquid waste.

steps.title: 500µL of CSPW2 Buffer is added...
steps.instruction: 500µL of CSPW2 Buffer is added to each column of samples and mixed.

steps.title: After incubating on the Mag Deck,...
steps.instruction: After incubating on the Mag Deck, 600µL is transferred to the liquid waste.

steps.title: 500µL of SPM Buffer (wash 1)...
steps.instruction: 500µL of SPM Buffer (wash 1) is added to each column of samples and mixed.

steps.title: After incubating on the Mag Deck,...
steps.instruction: After incubating on the Mag Deck, 600µL is transferred to the liquid waste.

steps.title: 500µL of SPM Buffer (wash 2)...
steps.instruction: 500µL of SPM Buffer (wash 2) is added to each column of samples and mixed.

steps.title: After incubating on the Mag Deck,...
steps.instruction: After incubating on the Mag Deck, the final wash removal volume stated is transferred to the liquid waste.

steps.title: [Optional] If the user selects to...
steps.instruction: [Optional] If the user selects to "add water before air dry", the pipette will slowly aspirate and dispense 100µL of nuclease-free water to each column of samples.

steps.title: A 10 minute incubation begins, at...
steps.instruction: A 10 minute incubation begins, at which point, the user should fill the reagent reservoir with the warmed Elution Buffer.

steps.title: Once the incubation period is over,...
steps.instruction: Once the incubation period is over, the Elution Buffer is added to the samples on the Mag Deck.

steps.title: The user is prompted to remove...
steps.instruction: The user is prompted to remove the Plate on the Mag Deck and incubate at 65C.

steps.title: Once the incubation is complete, the...
steps.instruction: Once the incubation is complete, the user returns the Plate to the Mag Deck.

steps.title: The Mag Deck engages and after...
steps.instruction: The Mag Deck engages and after the pellet forms, the elution is transferred to the PCR plate.
